Thanks for contributing to Hearth! A quick heads-up (see CONTRIBUTING.md):
Hearth is moving fast, so small, obvious fixes and translations are easy to
merge, but for anything larger please open an issue first so we can align
before you invest the work.
-->

## What does this PR do?

<!-- A short description of the change and why. -->

## Related issue

<!-- For anything beyond a trivial fix, link the issue discussed first.
     e.g. "Closes #123". Translations and one-line fixes don't need one. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] 🌍 Translation
- [ ] 📝 Docs
- [ ] ✨ Feature / behaviour change (discussed in an issue first)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] I've tested this in an actual vault
